---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Dan Kluger"
date: "10/21/2024"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


Figure for increasing error

```{r}
#Loading Results
resultsFilePath <- paste0(getwd(),"/Results/")
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"IncreaseError/ExrapolateInterpolateErrorQuickBoot.RData"))
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"IncreaseError/IncreaseNoiseSimsQuickBoot.RData"))
load(paste0(dirname(getwd()),"/Datasets/","HousingPriceFormatted.RData"))

```


```{r}
#Formatting and normalizing results
library(dplyr)
stackDf <- function(ResultsInp){
  ResultsOutMat <- ResultsInp[[1]]
  for(i in 2:length(ResultsInp)){
    ResultsOutMat <- rbind(ResultsOutMat,ResultsInp[[i]])
  }
  return(ResultsOutMat)
}
addNoiseResults <- stackDf(ResultsInp = addNightlightNoiseSims)
ExtrapErrorResults <- stackDf(ResultsInp = ModifyNightlightProxyErrorInterpAndExtrap)

ResultsComb <- rbind(addNoiseResults %>% mutate(ErrorType=rep("Noise",nrow(addNoiseResults))),
                     ExtrapErrorResults %>% mutate(ErrorType=rep("Extrapolation",nrow(ExtrapErrorResults))))

#Normalize by classical mean width
CIsWidthsClassicalAvg <- ResultsComb %>% filter(Method=="Classical") %>% group_by(Coefficient) %>%  summarise(ClassicalMean=mean(CIWidths_mean))

for(i in 1:nrow(CIsWidthsClassicalAvg)){
  idxCurrCoeff <- which(ResultsComb$Coefficient==CIsWidthsClassicalAvg$Coefficient[i])
  currMeanClass <- CIsWidthsClassicalAvg$ClassicalMean[i]
  ResultsComb$CIWidths_mean[idxCurrCoeff] <- ResultsComb$CIWidths_mean[idxCurrCoeff]/currMeanClass
  ResultsComb$CIWidths_sd[idxCurrCoeff] <- ResultsComb$CIWidths_sd[idxCurrCoeff]/currMeanClass
}

#Making interpolated error negative for clarity
ResultsComb$ErrorParameter[ResultsComb$ErrorType=="Extrapolation"] <- ResultsComb$ErrorParameter[ResultsComb$ErrorType=="Extrapolation"]-1


ResultsComb$Coefficient <- factor(ResultsComb$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept", "Income", "Nightlights", "Road Length"))
```




```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(patchwork)

NSim <- 2000
alphaTarg <- 0.1

color_scale_ManualTuning <- scale_color_manual(values = c("#619CFF","#c76e00","#65fe08","#348a00"))
pointShapeManual <- scale_shape_manual(values = c(16,15,17,18))
ptSizeManual <- scale_size_manual(values = c(0.5,0.5,0.5,3))

pltTheme <- theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=8),panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size=0.2),panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),legend.text = element_text(size=8))
#Make Figure 3


p1 <- ggplot(ResultsComb, aes(x = ErrorParameter, y = CIWidths_mean, color = Method,shape=Method)) +
  geom_point( size = 1.3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = CIWidths_mean - CIWidths_sd/sqrt(NSim), ymax = CIWidths_mean + CIWidths_sd/sqrt(NSim)),
    width = 0.1,alpha=1
  ) +
  facet_grid(ErrorType ~ Coefficient,switch="y") +
  labs(x = "", y = "Normalized Mean CI Width") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")+pointShapeManual+color_scale_ManualTuning+ptSizeManual+pltTheme#+ylim(c(0.2,1.6))


CoverageRange <- qbinom(p = c(0.01/2,1-0.01/2),size = NSim,prob = 1-alphaTarg)/NSim
p2 <- ggplot(ResultsComb, aes(x = ErrorParameter, y = Coverage, color = Method,shape=Method)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0), size = 1.3)  +
  facet_grid(ErrorType ~ Coefficient,switch="y") +
  labs(x = "Degradation Level of Nightlight Proxy", y = "Empirical Coverage") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",strip.text.x = element_blank())+pointShapeManual+color_scale_ManualTuning+ptSizeManual+pltTheme+geom_hline(yintercept = CoverageRange,col="black",linetype=3)+ylim(c(0.8,1))
#ggarrange(p1,p2,nrow = 2,common.legend = T,legend = "bottom")
FigOut <- (p1 / p2) +  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
ggsave(filename = paste0(getwd(),"/Figures/InsertError.pdf"),plot = FigOut,width = 8.5,height = 6)
```
```{r}
rm(list = setdiff(ls(),c("resultsFilePath")))
```


Dropping n figures

```{r}
#Loading results and tracking number of simulations using in each setting
library(dplyr)
resultsFilePath <- paste0(getwd(),"/Results/")

nSimsVec <- rep(NA,5)
names(nSimsVec) <- c("HousingPriceLinearReg","HousingPriceQuantileReg","TreecoverLinearReg","ForestCoverLogisticReg","CensusStratifiedReg")
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"LowerNumLabels/HousingPriceSimLessLabels.RData"))
nSimsVec['HousingPriceLinearReg'] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"LowerNumLabels/HousingPriceQuantileRegSimLessLabels.RData"))
nSimsVec['HousingPriceQuantileReg'] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"LowerNumLabels/TreecoverSimLessLabels.RData"))
nSimsVec['TreecoverLinearReg'] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)

load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"LowerNumLabels/ForestLogRegSimLessLabels.RData"))
nSimsVec['ForestCoverLogisticReg'] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)

load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"LowerNumLabels/CensusIncomeRegSimLessLabels.RData"))
nSimsVec['CensusStratifiedReg'] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)


print(nSimsVec)


```


```{r}
stackDfAndNorm <- function(ResultsInp,ExpNumberInp){
  ResultsMatStack <- ResultsInp[[1]]
  for(i in 2:length(ResultsInp)){
    ResultsMatStack <- rbind(ResultsMatStack,ResultsInp[[i]])
  }
  
  
  
  #Normalize by classical mean width
  CoefNames <- unique(ResultsMatStack$Coefficient)
  nVec <- unique(ResultsMatStack$n)
  ResultsOutMat <- ResultsMatStack
  ResultsOutMat$ExpNumber <- ExpNumberInp

  for(i in 1:length(CoefNames)){
    for(j in 1:length(nVec)){
      idxCurrComb <- (ResultsMatStack$Coefficient==CoefNames[i]) & (ResultsMatStack$n==nVec[j])
      CurrMeanClass <- ResultsMatStack$CIWidths_mean[which(idxCurrComb & ResultsMatStack$Method=="Classical")]
      ResultsOutMat$CIWidths_mean[idxCurrComb] <- ResultsMatStack$CIWidths_mean[idxCurrComb]/CurrMeanClass
      ResultsOutMat$CIWidths_sd[idxCurrComb] <- ResultsMatStack$CIWidths_sd[idxCurrComb]/CurrMeanClass
    }
  }
  
  #Anything where corresponding mean CI widths > 5 * 10^8 deemed too heavily skewed by perfect separation blowups, so CI widths in such cases not plotted
 ResultsOutMat$CIWidths_mean[ResultsMatStack$CIWidths_mean > (5 * 10^8)] <- NA #Won't plot mean CI widths in these cases
  



  
  return(ResultsOutMat)
  
  
}
HousingPriceResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsHousingPriceReg,ExpNumberInp = 2)
HousingPriceQuantileResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsHousingPriceQuantileReg,ExpNumberInp = 3)
TreecoverResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsTreecoverReg,ExpNumberInp = 4)
ForestResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = simsLowerLabelsForestLogReg,ExpNumberInp = 6)
CensusResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = CensusIncomeReg,ExpNumberInp = 7)


ResultsAllExps <- rbind(HousingPriceResults,HousingPriceQuantileResults,TreecoverResults,ForestResults,CensusResults)

ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned <- ResultsAllExps %>% filter(!(Method %in% c("PTD (No Tuning)","PTD Speedup (No Tuning)")))
table(ResultsAllExps$Method)
table(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Method)

ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Coefficient[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Coefficient=="RoadLength"] <- "Road Length"
ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Coefficient <- factor(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept","Income","Nightlights","Road Length","Elevation","Population","Age","Disability"))

ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Method[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Method=="PTD (Optimal Diagonal Tuning)"] <- "PTD (Diagonal)"
ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Method[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Method=="PTD (Optimal Tuning)"] <- "PTD (Optimal)"
ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Method[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Method=="PTD Speedup (Optimal Diagonal Tuning)"] <- "PTD Speedup (Diagonal)"
ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Method[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$Method=="PTD Speedup (Optimal Tuning)"] <- "PTD Speedup (Optimal)"

ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpTitle <- rep("NA",nrow(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned))
ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpTitle[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpNumber==2] <- c("(2) Linear Reg.")
ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpTitle[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpNumber==3] <- c("(3) Quantile Reg.")
ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpTitle[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpNumber==4] <- c("(4) Linear Reg.")
ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpTitle[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpNumber==6] <- c("(6) Logistic Reg.")
ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpTitle[ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned$ExpNumber==7] <- c("(7) Linear Reg.")



```


Coverage Only Plot

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

colorScale <- c("#619CFF", "#2A9D2A", "#E03030", "#2A9D2A", "#E03030")
shapeScale <- c(16, 5, 5, 3, 3)
make_plot <- function(data,NSim=2000,alphaTarg=0.1,colorVecInp,ShapeScaleInp) {
  hlines <- qbinom(p = c(0.01/2, 1 - 0.01/2), size = NSim, prob = 1 - alphaTarg) / NSim
  ggplot(data, aes(x = n, y = Coverage, 
                    color = Method, 
                    shape = Method)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) + ylim(c(0.8,1))+
    geom_hline(yintercept = hlines,col="black",linetype=3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = colorVecInp,
                       drop = FALSE) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shapeScale, drop = FALSE) +
    facet_grid(ExpTitle ~ Coefficient, switch = "y") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
      strip.placement = "outside",
      strip.text.y.left = element_text(size = 9),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}
df_top <- subset(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned, ExpNumber %in% c(2, 3))
df_bot <- subset(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned, ExpNumber %in% c(4, 6))
df_bot2 <- subset(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned, ExpNumber == 7)

p_top <- make_plot(df_top,colorVecInp = colorScale,ShapeScaleInp = shapeScale,NSim = mean(nSimsVec))
p_bot <- make_plot(df_bot,colorVecInp = colorScale,ShapeScaleInp = shapeScale,NSim = mean(nSimsVec))
p_bot2 <- make_plot(df_bot2,colorVecInp = colorScale,ShapeScaleInp = shapeScale,NSim = mean(nSimsVec))

# Extract legend
p_legend <- ggplot(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned, aes(x = n, y = Coverage, 
                                                 color = Method, 
                                                 shape = Method)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = colorScale) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shapeScale) +
  labs(color = "Method", shape = "Method") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",legend.text = element_text(size=7))+
    theme_bw()
legend <- get_legend(p_legend)
# Bottom row: 3/4 plot, 1/4 legend
bottom_rowNoLegend <- (p_bot / p_bot2) + plot_layout(heights = c(2,1))
bottom_row <- ( bottom_rowNoLegend  | wrap_elements(legend)) + plot_layout(widths = c(3.2, 1))
# Stack
stacked <- p_top / bottom_row + plot_layout(heights = c(2,3.5))

# Shared y title — use wrap_elements with a clip="off" panel
y_title <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Empirical Coverage", rot = 90,
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))

x_title <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Expected Number of Complete Samples",
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))

final <- y_title + stacked + plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 40))
final <- final / x_title + plot_layout(heights = c(40, 1.5))

# Add some breathing room around the whole figure
#final <- final & theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))

ggsave(filename = paste0(getwd(),"/Figures/Reduce_n.pdf"),
       plot = final, width = 8.5, height = 8)
```


CI Width Only Plot

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

colorScale <- c("#619CFF", "#2A9D2A", "#E03030", "#2A9D2A", "#E03030")
shapeScale <- c(16, 5, 5, 3, 3)
make_plot <- function(data,colorVecInp,ShapeScaleInp) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = n, y = CIWidths_mean, 
                    color = Method, 
                    shape = Method)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = colorVecInp,
                       drop = FALSE) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shapeScale, drop = FALSE) +
    facet_grid(ExpTitle ~ Coefficient,scales = "free_y", switch = "y") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
      strip.placement = "outside",
      strip.text.y.left = element_text(size=9),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}
df_top <- subset(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned, ExpNumber %in% c(2, 3))
df_bot <- subset(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned, ExpNumber %in% c(4, 6))
df_bot2 <- subset(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned, ExpNumber ==7)

p_top <- make_plot(df_top,colorVecInp = colorScale,ShapeScaleInp = shapeScale)
p_bot <- make_plot(df_bot,colorVecInp = colorScale,ShapeScaleInp = shapeScale)
p_bot2 <- make_plot(df_bot2,colorVecInp = colorScale,ShapeScaleInp = shapeScale)

# Extract legend
p_legend <- ggplot(ResultsAllExpsNoUntuned, aes(x = n, y = CIWidths_mean, 
                                                 color = Method, 
                                                 shape = Method)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = colorScale) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shapeScale) +
  labs(color = "Method", shape = "Method") +
  theme(legend.position = "right",legend.text = element_text(size=7))+
    theme_bw()
legend <- get_legend(p_legend)
# Bottom row: 3/4 plot, 1/4 legend
bottom_rowNoLegend <- (p_bot / p_bot2) + plot_layout(heights = c(2,1))
bottom_row <- ( bottom_rowNoLegend  | wrap_elements(legend)) + plot_layout(widths = c(3.2, 1))
# Stack
stacked <- p_top / bottom_row + plot_layout(heights = c(2,3.5))

# Shared y title — use wrap_elements with a clip="off" panel
y_title <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Normalized Mean CI Width", rot = 90,
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))

x_title <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Expected Number of Complete Samples",
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))

final <- y_title + stacked + plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 40))
final <- final / x_title + plot_layout(heights = c(40, 1.5))

# Add some breathing room around the whole figure
#final <- final & theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))

ggsave(filename = paste0(getwd(),"/Figures/Reduce_n_meanCI_width.pdf"),
       plot = final, width = 8.5, height = 8)
```




Comparison to multiple imputation figure

```{r}
rm(list = setdiff(ls(),c("resultsFilePath")))
```



```{r}
 nSimsPerSettingVec <- rep(NA,5)
resultsFilePath <- paste0(getwd(),"/Results/")
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"MultipleImputationComp/ExponentiateProxyHousingPriceWithMI.RData"))
nSimsPerSettingVec[1] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"MultipleImputationComp/ExponentiateProxyHousingPriceQuantRegWithMI.RData"))
nSimsPerSettingVec[2] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"MultipleImputationComp/ExponentiateProxyTreecoverWithMI.RData"))
nSimsPerSettingVec[3] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"MultipleImputationComp/ExponentiateProxyTreecoverClusteredWithMI.RData"))
nSimsPerSettingVec[4] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"MultipleImputationComp/ExponentiateProxyForestLogRegWithMI.RData"))
nSimsPerSettingVec[5] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
print(nSimsPerSettingVec)
if(min(nSimsPerSettingVec)==max(nSimsPerSettingVec)){nSimsPerSetting <- mean(nSimsPerSettingVec)}
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
stackDfAndNorm <- function(ResultsInp){
  ResultsMatStack <- ResultsInp[[1]]
  for(i in 2:length(ResultsInp)){
    ResultsMatStack <- rbind(ResultsMatStack,ResultsInp[[i]])
  }
  
  
  #Normalize by classical mean width
CIsWidthsClassicalAvg <- ResultsMatStack %>% filter(Method=="Classical") %>% group_by(Coefficient) %>%  summarise(ClassicalMean=mean(CIWidths_mean))
ResultsOutMat <- ResultsMatStack
for(i in 1:nrow(CIsWidthsClassicalAvg)){
  idxCurrCoeff <- which(ResultsMatStack$Coefficient==CIsWidthsClassicalAvg$Coefficient[i])
  currMeanClass <- CIsWidthsClassicalAvg$ClassicalMean[i]
  ResultsOutMat$CIWidths_mean[idxCurrCoeff] <- ResultsMatStack$CIWidths_mean[idxCurrCoeff]/currMeanClass
  ResultsOutMat$CIWidths_sd[idxCurrCoeff] <- ResultsMatStack$CIWidths_sd[idxCurrCoeff]/currMeanClass
  
  
}
  ResultsOutMat$Method[ResultsMatStack$Method=="PTD (Optimal Diagonal Tuning)"] <- "PTD (Diagonal Tuning)"
  return(ResultsOutMat)
  
  
}
HousingPriceResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsHousingPrice)
HousingPriceQuantRegResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsHousingPriceQuantReg)
TreecoverResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsTreecover)
TreecoverClusteredResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsTreecoverClustered)
ForestCoverResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsForestCoverLogReg)

# Add an experiment label column to each dataset
HousingPriceResults$Experiment <- "(2) Linear Reg."
HousingPriceQuantRegResults$Experiment <- "(3) Quantile Reg."
TreecoverResults$Experiment <- "(4) Linear Reg."
TreecoverClusteredResults$Experiment <- "(5) Linear Reg."
ForestCoverResults$Experiment <- "(6) Logistic Reg."

HousingPriceResults$Coefficient[HousingPriceResults$Coefficient=="RoadLength"] <- "Road Length*"
HousingPriceResults$Coefficient <- factor(HousingPriceResults$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept","Income","Nightlights","Road Length*"))

HousingPriceQuantRegResults$Coefficient[HousingPriceQuantRegResults$Coefficient=="RoadLength"] <- "Road Length*"
HousingPriceQuantRegResults$Coefficient <- factor(HousingPriceQuantRegResults$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept","Income","Nightlights","Road Length*"))


TreecoverResults$Coefficient[TreecoverResults$Coefficient=="Population"] <- "Population*"
TreecoverResults$Coefficient <- factor(TreecoverResults$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept","Elevation","Population*"))

TreecoverClusteredResults$Coefficient[TreecoverClusteredResults$Coefficient=="Population"] <- "Population*"
TreecoverClusteredResults$Coefficient <- factor(TreecoverClusteredResults$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept","Elevation","Population*"))

ForestCoverResults$Coefficient[ForestCoverResults$Coefficient=="Population"] <- "Population*"
ForestCoverResults$Coefficient <- factor(ForestCoverResults$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept","Elevation","Population*"))
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

color_scale_vals <- c("#619CFF","#A31515","#65fe08")
shape_vals <- c(16,15,17)

# --- Coverage figure ---

make_coverage_plot <- function(data, exp_label, NSim = nSimsPerSetting, alphaTarg = 0.1) {
  CoverageRange <- qbinom(p = c(0.01/2, 1 - 0.01/2), size = NSim, prob = 1 - alphaTarg) / NSim
  ggplot(data, aes(x = ErrorParam, y = Coverage, color = Method, shape = Method)) +
    geom_point(size = 1.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = CoverageRange, col = "black", linetype = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_scale_vals, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vals, drop = FALSE) +
    facet_grid(rows = vars(!!sym(exp_label)), cols = vars(Coefficient), switch = "y",scales = "free_y") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
      strip.placement = "outside",
  #    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 0.2),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)
    ) 
}



# Housing Price has 4 coefficients (top row)
p_cov_top <- make_coverage_plot(rbind(HousingPriceResults,HousingPriceQuantRegResults), "Experiment")

# Treecover and Forest Cover have 3 coefficients each (bottom rows)
df_cov_bot <- rbind(TreecoverResults,TreecoverClusteredResults, ForestCoverResults)
p_cov_bot <- make_coverage_plot(df_cov_bot, "Experiment")

# Extract legend
p_legend_cov <- ggplot(HousingPriceResults, aes(x = ErrorParam, y = Coverage,
                                                  color = Method, shape = Method)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_scale_vals) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vals) +
  labs(color = "Method", shape = "Method") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.text = element_text(size = 8))

legend_cov <- get_legend(p_legend_cov)

# Bottom: 3/4 plot, 1/4 legend
bottom_cov <- (p_cov_bot | wrap_elements(legend_cov)) + plot_layout(widths = c(3.25, 1))

stacked_cov <- p_cov_top / bottom_cov + plot_layout(heights = c(2, 3))

y_title_cov <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Empirical Coverage", rot = 90,
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))
x_title_cov <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Exponent Used to Degrade Proxy",
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))

final_cov <- y_title_cov + stacked_cov + plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 40))
final_cov <- final_cov / x_title_cov + plot_layout(heights = c(40, 1.5))
#final_cov <- final_cov & theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))

ggsave(filename = paste0(getwd(), "/Figures/MultipleImputationCoverage.pdf"),
       plot = final_cov, width = 8.5, height = 7.5)


# --- CI Width figure ---

make_width_plot <- function(data, exp_label, NSim = nSimsPerSetting) {
  rangeX <- max(data$ErrorParam) - min(data$ErrorParam)
  ggplot(data, aes(x = ErrorParam, y = CIWidths_mean, color = Method, shape = Method)) +
    geom_point(size = 1.5) +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(ymin = CIWidths_mean - CIWidths_sd / sqrt(NSim),
          ymax = CIWidths_mean + CIWidths_sd / sqrt(NSim)),
      width = rangeX / 30, alpha = 1
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_scale_vals, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vals, drop = FALSE) +
    facet_grid(rows = vars(!!sym(exp_label)), cols = vars(Coefficient), switch = "y",scales = "free_y") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
      strip.placement = "outside",
     # strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 0.2),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)
    )
}

p_wid_top <- make_width_plot(rbind(HousingPriceResults,HousingPriceQuantRegResults), "Experiment")

df_wid_bot <- rbind(TreecoverResults,TreecoverClusteredResults, ForestCoverResults)
p_wid_bot <- make_width_plot(df_wid_bot, "Experiment")

legend_wid <- get_legend(p_legend_cov)  # same legend

bottom_wid <- (p_wid_bot | wrap_elements(legend_wid)) + plot_layout(widths = c(3.25, 1))

stacked_wid <- p_wid_top / bottom_wid + plot_layout(heights = c(2, 3))

y_title_wid <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Normalized Mean Confidence Interval Width", rot = 90,
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))
x_title_wid <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Exponent Used to Degrade Proxy",
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))

final_wid <- y_title_wid + stacked_wid + plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 40))
final_wid <- final_wid / x_title_wid + plot_layout(heights = c(40, 1.5))
#final_wid <- final_wid & theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))

ggsave(filename = paste0(getwd(), "/Figures/MultipleImputationCIWidth.pdf"),
       plot = final_wid, width = 8.5, height = 7.5)
```


```{r}
rm(list = setdiff(ls(),c("resultsFilePath")))
```


Make comparison to PPI++ figure



```{r}
 nSimsPerSettingVec <- rep(NA,3)
resultsFilePath <- paste0(getwd(),"/Results/")
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"PPI++Comp/IncreaseTranslationErrorPPI++HousingPriceQuickBoot.RData"))
nSimsPerSettingVec[1] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"PPI++Comp/IncreaseTranslationErrorPPI++TreecoverQuickBoot.RData"))
nSimsPerSettingVec[2] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
load(paste0(resultsFilePath,"PPI++Comp/IncreaseTranslationErrorPPI++ForestLogRegQuickBoot.RData"))
nSimsPerSettingVec[3] <- nSimsPerSetting
rm(nSimsPerSetting)
print(nSimsPerSettingVec)
if(min(nSimsPerSettingVec)==max(nSimsPerSettingVec)){nSimsPerSetting <- mean(nSimsPerSettingVec)}
```




```{r}
stackDfAndNorm <- function(ResultsInp){
  ResultsMatStack <- ResultsInp[[1]]
  for(i in 2:length(ResultsInp)){
    ResultsMatStack <- rbind(ResultsMatStack,ResultsInp[[i]])
  }
  
  
  #Normalize by classical mean width
CIsWidthsClassicalAvg <- ResultsMatStack %>% filter(Method=="Classical") %>% group_by(Coefficient) %>%  summarise(ClassicalMean=mean(CIWidths_mean))
ResultsOutMat <- ResultsMatStack
for(i in 1:nrow(CIsWidthsClassicalAvg)){
  idxCurrCoeff <- which(ResultsMatStack$Coefficient==CIsWidthsClassicalAvg$Coefficient[i])
  currMeanClass <- CIsWidthsClassicalAvg$ClassicalMean[i]
  ResultsOutMat$CIWidths_mean[idxCurrCoeff] <- ResultsMatStack$CIWidths_mean[idxCurrCoeff]/currMeanClass
  ResultsOutMat$CIWidths_sd[idxCurrCoeff] <- ResultsMatStack$CIWidths_sd[idxCurrCoeff]/currMeanClass
  
  
}
  ResultsOutMat$Method[ResultsMatStack$Method=="PTD (Optimal Diagonal Tuning)"] <- "PTD (Diagonal Tuning)"
  return(ResultsOutMat)
  
  
}
HousingPriceResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsHousingPrice)
TreecoverResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsTreecover)
ForestCoverResults <- stackDfAndNorm(ResultsInp = SimsForestCoverLogReg)

# Add an experiment label column to each dataset
HousingPriceResults$Experiment <- "(2) Linear Reg."
TreecoverResults$Experiment <- "(4) Linear Reg."
ForestCoverResults$Experiment <- "(6) Logistic Reg."

HousingPriceResults$Coefficient[HousingPriceResults$Coefficient=="RoadLength"] <- "Road Length"
HousingPriceResults$Coefficient <- factor(HousingPriceResults$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept","Income","Nightlights","Road Length"))


TreecoverResults$Coefficient[TreecoverResults$Coefficient=="Population"] <- "Population"
TreecoverResults$Coefficient <- factor(TreecoverResults$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept","Elevation","Population"))

ForestCoverResults$Coefficient[ForestCoverResults$Coefficient=="Population"] <- "Population"
ForestCoverResults$Coefficient <- factor(ForestCoverResults$Coefficient,levels = c("Intercept","Elevation","Population"))
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(ggh4x)

color_scale_vals <- c("#619CFF","#FF2020","#65fe08","#8B44AC")
shape_vals <- c(16,3,17,18)

# --- Coverage figure ---

make_coverage_plot <- function(data, exp_label, NSim = nSimsPerSetting, alphaTarg = 0.1) {
  CoverageRange <- qbinom(p = c(0.01/2, 1 - 0.01/2), size = NSim, prob = 1 - alphaTarg) / NSim
  ggplot(data, aes(x = ErrorParam, y = Coverage, color = Method, shape = Method)) +
    geom_point(size = 1.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = CoverageRange, col = "black", linetype = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_scale_vals, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vals, drop = FALSE) +
    facet_grid2(rows = vars(!!sym(exp_label)), cols = vars(Coefficient), switch = "y",scales = "free", independent= "x") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
      strip.placement = "outside",
  #    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 0.2),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))+ylim(c(0.8,1))
}



# Housing Price has 4 coefficients (top row)
p_cov_top <- make_coverage_plot(HousingPriceResults, "Experiment")

# Treecover and Forest Cover have 3 coefficients each (bottom rows)
df_cov_bot <- rbind(TreecoverResults, ForestCoverResults)
p_cov_bot <- make_coverage_plot(df_cov_bot, "Experiment")

# Extract legend
p_legend_cov <- ggplot(HousingPriceResults, aes(x = ErrorParam, y = Coverage,
                                                  color = Method, shape = Method)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_scale_vals) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vals) +
  labs(color = "Method", shape = "Method") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.text = element_text(size = 8))+ylim(c(0.8,1))

legend_cov <- get_legend(p_legend_cov)

# Bottom: 3/4 plot, 1/4 legend
bottom_cov <- (p_cov_bot | wrap_elements(legend_cov)) + plot_layout(widths = c(3.1, 1))
stacked_cov <- align_patches(p_cov_top, p_cov_bot)

stacked_cov <- p_cov_top / bottom_cov + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 2.3))

y_title_cov <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Empirical Coverage", rot = 90,
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))
x_title_cov <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Shift in Mean of Proxy for Outcome Variable",
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))

final_cov <- y_title_cov + stacked_cov + plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 40))
final_cov <- final_cov / x_title_cov + plot_layout(heights = c(40, 1.5))
#final_cov <- final_cov & theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))

ggsave(filename = paste0(getwd(), "/Figures/PPIPlusPlusCoverage.pdf"),
       plot = final_cov, width = 8.5, height = 5)


# --- CI Width figure ---

make_width_plot <- function(data, exp_label, NSim = nSimsPerSetting) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = ErrorParam, y = CIWidths_mean, color = Method, shape = Method)) +
    geom_point(size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_scale_vals, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vals, drop = FALSE) +
    facet_grid2(rows = vars(!!sym(exp_label)), cols = vars(Coefficient), switch = "y",scales = "free", independent= "x") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
      strip.placement = "outside",
     # strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 0.2),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8), 
     plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2)
    )
}

p_wid_top <- make_width_plot(HousingPriceResults, "Experiment")

df_wid_bot <- rbind(TreecoverResults, ForestCoverResults)
p_wid_bot <- make_width_plot(df_wid_bot, "Experiment")

legend_wid <- get_legend(p_legend_cov)  # same legend

bottom_wid <- (p_wid_bot | wrap_elements(legend_wid)) + plot_layout(widths = c(3.1, 1))

stacked_wid <- p_wid_top / bottom_wid + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 2.3))

y_title_wid <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Normalized Mean Confidence Interval Width", rot = 90,
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))
x_title_wid <- wrap_elements(panel = grid::textGrob(
  "Shift in Mean of Proxy for Outcome Variable",
  gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11),
  vp = grid::viewport(clip = "off")
))

final_wid <- y_title_wid + stacked_wid + plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 40))
final_wid <- final_wid / x_title_wid + plot_layout(heights = c(40, 1.5))
#final_wid <- final_wid & theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))

ggsave(filename = paste0(getwd(), "/Figures/PIPlusPlusCIWidth.pdf"),
       plot = final_wid, width = 8.5, height = 5)
```
